stemHtml: What is the correct use of the suffix 'HEAVY' or 'SUPER'?

options.a: The suffix 'SUPER' is used for Boeing 747 and Airbus A380 aircraft only, and it is included immediately before the aircraft call sign in the initial call to each ATSU.
options.b: The suffix 'SUPER' is used for Boeing 747 and Airbus A380 aircraft only, and it is included immediately after the aircraft call sign in the initial call to each ATSU.
options.c: Aircraft in the heavy wake turbulence category shall include the word 'HEAVY' immediately before the aircraft call sign in the initial call to each ATSU.
options.d: Aircraft in the heavy wake turbulence category shall include the word 'HEAVY' immediately after the aircraft call sign in the initial call to each ATSU.
